items.title: Transit Ops Incident Stabilization Sprint
items.description: A focused KTLO initiative to reduce critical production defects, tighten incident response loops, and remove the highest-severity reliability failures affecting Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS) operations.

items.title: Journey Platform Debt Retirement
items.description: A KTLO initiative to reduce operational drag by refactoring brittle integrations, simplifying recovery paths, and removing legacy technical debt that slows change in Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS).

items.title: Transit Platform Patch Compliance Cycle
items.description: A KTLO initiative to keep the Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS) stack within security patch SLAs by upgrading vulnerable dependencies, rotating outdated components, and closing remediation gaps.
